characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Acquired Situational Narcissism Berserk Button: Never call Ray old, and never insult the attractiveness of any of the women he has a crush on. And never stop him from trying to flirt with a hot mom. Casanova Wannabe/Prince Charming Wannabe Eccentric Mentor: To the Danger Force along with Schwoz. Flanderization: Ray's character initially started out in the original show "Henry Danger" as a rather well-rounded, rational man. However, through the transition between the shows "Henry Danger" and "Danger Force", he becomes much more cynical,practically and overly lustful for any woman that comes his way, highly irrational, stubborn, and pig-headed, borderline narcissistic, and goes almost hysterical when things don't go his way.

characters.name: Ray Manchester/Captain Man
characters.description: Acquired Situational Narcissism Berserk Button: Never call Ray old, and never insult the attractiveness of any of the women he has a crush on. And never stop him from trying to flirt with a hot mom. Casanova Wannabe/Prince Charming Wannabe Eccentric Mentor: To the Danger Force along with Schwoz. Flanderization: Ray's character initially started out in the original show "Henry Danger" as a rather well-rounded, rational man. However, through the transition between the shows "Henry Danger" and "Danger Force", he becomes much more cynical,practically and overly lustful for any woman that comes his way, highly irrational, stubborn, and pig-headed, borderline narcissistic, and goes almost hysterical when things don't go his way.

characters.name: Schwoz Schwartz
characters.description: Amazon Chaser: He loves women that are taller and bigger than him. Bunny-Ears Lawyer: Great science and technology expert, but as far as his personality and weird quirks are concerned, he has a tendency to be very weird sometimes. Ditzy Genius: While undeniably brilliant, he can be rather spacy and literal-minded. Eccentric Mentor: To the Danger Force along with Ray. Interspecies Friendship: Schwoz is friend with many aliens in the show that come in contact with Earth.

characters.name: Mika Macklin/Shout-Out
characters.description: Action Girl: As one of the female members of Danger Force, she is a pretty good martial arts fighter and is very good at self-defense. Alliterative Family: Her and her twin brother Miles Macklin. Best Friends: With Chapa and Bose. Black and Nerdy: She is shown to be very passionate about intellectual and academic topics. Brother–Sister Team: With Miles.

characters.name: Miles Macklin/AWOL
characters.description: Alliterative Family: Him and his twin sister, Mika Macklin. Awesome, but Impractical:Miles can see short glimpses of the future in visions, but he cannot control when this power activates. Best Friends: With Chapa and Bose. Blaming "The Man": Often does this when things go wrong in the societal or political aspects of Swellview that may involve crime and Captain Man and the Danger Force. Brother–Sister Team: With Mika.

characters.name: Chapa de Silva/Volt
characters.description: Action Girl: Along with Mika. All Girls Want Bad Boys: When Chapa's date to theSwell Melon Festis Scar who is a bad boy. Berserk Button/The Berserker: Oftentimes, Chapa is the one who rushes headfirst into every battle when she goes into a rage or because of her over-confidence, and especially when someone triggers her emotions about her old phone being stolen from her. Best Friends: With Bose, Mika, and Miles. Boyish Short Hair: You would be forgiven for thinking Chapa's a boy.

characters.name: Bose O'Brian/ Brain Storm
characters.description: Chick Magnet: Like Ray, he is aware that he is a chick magnet sometimes and will use that to his advantage. Color-Coded Characters: Blue. The Ditz: Bose is far from the brightest. Four-Temperament Ensemble: He’s sanguine. He’s dim-witted, yet happy, kind and cheery. Mind Over Matter: Bose's telekinesis.

characters.name: Trent Overunder
characters.description: Ascended Extra: Along with Mary. InHenry Danger,Mary and Trent were often just extras, and later on recurring characters who only appeared every few episodes. InDanger Force,they become involved in major plot points in every episode. The Dividual: With Mary Gaperman. Took a Level in Kindness: Although he still often gets annoyed and agitated by Mary's eccentric personality, he is shown to be much nicer and kinder to Mary in Danger Force.

characters.name: Mary Gaperman
characters.description: '20s Bob Haircut: Mary's usual hairstyle. Ascended Extra: Along with Trent. InHenry Danger,Mary and Trent were often just extras, and later on recurring characters who only appeared every few episodes. InDanger Force,they become involved in major plot points in every episode. The Dividual: With Trent Overunder.

characters.name: Celia O'Brian
characters.description: The Ditz: She is shown to be a bit of an airhead sometimes. Really Gets Around: She's been married previously to four other "vices". She definitelyHas a Type. Rich Bitch:Downplayed.Because she is rather wealthy and is married to the vice mayor of the city, she sometimes has a little bit of a tendency to be a spoiled bitch sometimes. However, she is not excessively mean or sadistic, and she does exhibit compassion and kindness for others; she just has a tendency to be a little bit of aJerkasssometimes. Trophy Wife: To Vice Mayor Willard.

characters.name: Vice Mayor Willard
characters.description: Age-Gap Romance: Downplayed. Although their ages are not explicitly given, Vice Mayor Willard is portrayed to be at least in his mid-to-late 50's, while his wife Celia, is portrayed to be in her early 40s, closer to Ray's/Captain Man's age. Good Stepfather: Downplayed because Vice Mayor Willard is a fairly good stepfather to Bose, but he can also be a little bit of aJerk with a Heart of Goldtowards him sometimes too. Parental Substitute: Vice Mayor Willard often tries to be a good father figure to Bosesometimes,but he's not always extremely devoted to it.

characters.name: Officer Didi Walnut
characters.description: Mama Bear: Although she's not Miles' and Mika's mom, she can be a little overprotective of her niece and nephew sometimes. Minority Police Officer: Not only is she a Black cop, but she's also afemaleBlack cop. Sassy Black Woman: She is where Mika gets it from. Twofer Token Minority: See the above "Minority Police Officer" section above.
